reviews.review_description: I LOVE DISECTING SQUIDS SO ENTERTAINING AND AMAZING I TOTALLY RECOMMEND 👍👍
I thought I would be cutting animals not getting a lecture

I want more of what you might expect… as to say you know this is a fab app but lacks some things like video information ( YouTube) more details and access to the Wikipedia with narrator so you learn more for the money I’m disappointed but I hope more updates will fix this it really could expand into a truly awesome wonderful thing with class rooms pals and level universities classs and paid content if Ned be ( extra details/information) and real life experience like raspberry pie programming and the likes also 
It’s just a bit expensive for kids to buy or even gift to people as it’s not like killing trolls in rec room so we need it to be easier to get in to …?
